Localization.Description: The maximum number of attempts to authenticate via SSH is exceeded

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host}:{src.port} exceeded the maximum number of attempts to authenticate via SSH on host {event_src.host}
An unknown user from host {src.host}:{src.port} exceeded the maximum number of attempts to authenticate via SSH on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}:{src.port} exceeded the maximum number of attempts to authenticate via SSH on host {event_src.host}
The unknown user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}:{src.port} exceeded the maximum number of attempts to authenticate via SSH on host {event_src.host}
